posts.description: Easy Photo Player turns your TV into a digital photo frame that plays your Google Photos as a slideshow — at full resolution, with smooth transitions. Install on the TV, link with a short code at easyphotoplayer.com, and pick your photos with Google's own picker. Free to start, no credit card. Now global on Android TV.

posts.name: WorkInPilot
posts.tagline: A Community for Job Seekers - One app, the whole cockpit
posts.description: WorkInPilot is a community career platform for job seekers ready to be the captain of their own journey. Get AI-assisted reviews and rewrites to get your resume in shape, apply faster with AI-assisted tools, and track every application in one place. Application graphs give you a quick read on your progress and cadence — so you always know where you stand. Your story, articulated, never fabricated.

posts.name: SayHola - Experience Network Layer
posts.tagline: The experience network for the real world
posts.description: SayHola is building the human connection layer for the real world — a real-time Experience Network where travel, discovery, language, and culture connect. With Hola Trips, travelers discover destinations, trips, events, and local experiences worldwide. SayHola connects them with the people behind those experiences, enabling real-time conversations across languages and shared moments.

posts.name: Pipeline — SaaS Landing Page Template
posts.tagline: Ship a professional SaaS landing page in minutes, no coding
posts.description: Pipeline is a modern, fully responsive landing page template built for SaaS products and developer tools. No frameworks, no build tools, no dependencies just a single HTML file with clean, well-organized CSS variables that make customization simple. What makes it different: A distinctive animated hero section that shows your product's workflow in action, instead of a generic static image - Built with plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, so there's nothing to install or configure read the README.
